page_metadata.biotools__summary: Package containing an S4 class for translating mature miRNA names to different miRBase versions, sequence retrieval, checking names for validity and detecting miRBase version of a given set of names.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Package containing an S4 class for translating mature miRNA names to different miRBase versions, sequence retrieval, checking names for validity and detecting miRBase version of a given set of names.
